Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"captain found a ::: on the last walk out
says it'll bring us luck
we'll need it, cruise has been a ::: waste so far
all the asteroids just dust and ice
::: nonsense but better than nothing"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"going from bad to worse
can't wait to get home
navigation ::: distorted ::: nothing but static
warping but ::: just empty systems
::: lost in some abandoned sector?"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"the captain ::: gone
tried to wake them for their watch
no sign of them ::: nothing on the cameras
door logs are normal, no kit missing
where are they?
where are we"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"we saw them
they ::: out the airlock
just ::: floating there
could hear them ::: singing
...
get us home ::: please"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"they all followed ::: the music
one by one ::: the lights called them
alone now
i hear the song now too, even when i ::: sleep
i'm so lonely ::: when will ::: when
help"

Name: %name% Implant
Description:
A pre-grown bionic implant, designed to facilitate the fusion of bio-technology to sentient starships. Use FE_ALT1 to begin the installation process.

%TECH_DESC%

Name: %name% Package
Description:
An archived wiring package, designed to allow easy storage of core technology. Use FE_ALT1 to begin the installation process.

%TECH_DESC%

Name: %name% Node
Description:
A cryogenically frozen node, designed to facilitate the archival of bio-technology for sentient starships. Use FE_ALT1 to begin the installation process.

%TECH_DESC%

Name: Shutter Door
Description: An autonomous shutter door, programmed to open in the presence of its constructor.

Name: Ruined Slab
Description:
A recreation of a piece of ancient architecture, the wreckage of a long-forgotten civilisation.

Constructed with polished stone, salvaged from similar structures found on ruined worlds.
